{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Galactic Union warships
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|There are four dozen [[Galactic Union warships]] surrounding the narrator.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
